member.name: T:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1
member.summary: Represents the context for adding a resilience pipeline with the specified key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.PipelineKey
member.summary: Gets the pipeline key for the pipeline being created.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Gets the that provides access to the dependency injection container.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.RegistryContext
member.summary: Gets the context that is used by the registry.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.EnableReloads``1(System.String)
member.summary: Enables dynamic reloading of the resilience pipeline whenever the options are changed.
member.typeparam: The options type to listen to.
member.param: The named options, if any.
member.remarks:
You can decide based on the to listen for changes in global options or named options. If is then the global options are listened to.
You can listen for changes from multiple options by calling this method with different types.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.GetOptions``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the options identified by .
member.typeparam: The options type.
member.param: The options name, if any.
member.remarks: If is then the global options are returned.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext`1.OnPipelineDisposed(System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a callback that is called when the pipeline instance being configured is disposed.
member.param: The callback delegate.

member.name: T:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1
member.summary: Represents the context for configuring resilience pipelines with the specified key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.

member.name: P:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Gets the that provides access to the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.AddResiliencePipeline(`0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder,Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{`0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to the registry.
member.param: The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext`1.AddResiliencePipeline``1(`0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``0},Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{`0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to the registry.
member.typeparam: The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: T:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering resilience pipelines using the .

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``1}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline that handles to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder{``1},Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{``0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline that handles to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The type of result that the resilience pipeline handles.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipeline``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,``0,System.Action{Polly.ResiliencePipelineBuilder,Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelineContext{``0}})
member.summary: Adds a resilience pipeline to service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
An action that configures the resilience pipeline.
member.returns: The updated with the registered resilience pipeline.
member.remarks:
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelines``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Polly.DependencyInjection.AddResiliencePipelinesContext{``0}})
member.summary: Allows deferred addition of one or more resilience pipelines to the service collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipelines.
member.param: The to add resilience pipelines to.
An action that allows configuration of resilience pipelines.
member.returns: The updated with the addition configuration added.
member.remarks:
This method can be useful if you want to add resilience pipelines as late as possible, e.g. to allow other services / configuration to be available before providing the key.
You can retrieve the registered pipeline by resolving the class from the dependency injection container.
This call enables telemetry for the registered resilience pipeline.

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelineRegistry``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Polly.Registry.ResiliencePipelineRegistryOptions{``0}})
member.summary: Adds and to the service collection that allows configuring and retrieving resilience pipelines using the key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
The action that configures the that are used by the registry.
member.returns: The updated with additional services added.
member.remarks: This call enables telemetry for all resilience pipelines created using .

member.name: M:Polly.PollyServiceCollectionExtensions.AddResiliencePipelineRegistry``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds and to the service collection that allows configuring and retrieving resilience pipelines using the key.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The to add the resilience pipeline to.
member.returns: The updated with additional services added.
member.remarks: This call enables telemetry for all resilience pipelines created using .

member.name: T:Polly.Registry.ConfigureBuilderContextExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for .

member.name: M:Polly.Registry.ConfigureBuilderContextExtensions.EnableReloads``2(Polly.Registry.ConfigureBuilderContext{``0},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptionsMonitor{``1},System.String)
member.summary: Enables dynamic reloading of the resilience pipeline whenever the options are changed.
member.typeparam: The type of the key used to identify the resilience pipeline.
The options type to listen to.
member.param: The builder context.
The options monitor.
The named options, if any.
member.remarks:
You can decide based on the to listen for changes in global options or named options. If is then the global options are listened to.
You can listen for changes from multiple options by calling this method with different types.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2
member.summary: Enrichment context used when reporting resilience events.
member.typeparam: The type of the result.
The type of the arguments attached to the resilience event.
member.remarks: This context is passed to enrichers in . Always use the constructor when creating this struct, otherwise we do not guarantee binary compatibility.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.#ctor(Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryEventArguments{`0,`1}@,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The telemetry event info.
Tags associated with the resilience event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.TelemetryEvent
member.summary: Gets the info about the telemetry event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext`2.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tags associated with the resilience event.
member.remarks: Custom enricher can add tags to this collection.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__ResilienceEventStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__PipelineExecutedStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.Log.__ExecutionAttemptStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.MeteringEnricher
member.summary: Enricher used to enrich the metrics with additional information.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.MeteringEnricher.Enrich``2(Polly.Telemetry.EnrichmentContext{``0,``1}@)
member.summary: Enriches the metrics with additional information.
member.typeparam: The type of result.
The type of arguments.
member.param: The enrichment context.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.SeverityProviderArguments
member.summary: Arguments used by .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The source that produced the resilience event.
The resilience event.
The resilience context.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.SeverityProviderArguments.Source
member.summary: Gets the source that produced the resilience event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.SeverityProviderArguments.Event
member.summary: Gets the resilience event.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.SeverityProviderArguments.Context
member.summary: Gets the resilience context.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TagsList.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tags associated with the resilience event.

member.name: T:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions
member.summary: The options that are used to configure the telemetry that is produced by the resilience strategies.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.#ctor(Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The telemetry options instance to copy the data from.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.TelemetryListeners
member.summary: Gets the collection of telemetry listeners.
member.value: The default value is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.LoggerFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger factory.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.MeteringEnrichers
member.summary: Gets the collection of telemetry enrichers.
member.value: The default value is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.ResultFormatter
member.summary: Gets or sets the result formatter.
member.value: The default value is a formatter that returns a status code for HTTP based responses and the result as-is for all other result types. This property is required.

member.name: P:Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions.SeverityProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the resilience event severity provider that allows customizing the severity of resilience events.

member.name: T:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions
member.summary: The telemetry extensions for the .

member.name: M:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelemetry``1(``0,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Enables telemetry for this builder.
member.typeparam: The builder type.
member.param: The builder instance.
The logger factory to be used for logging.
member.returns: The builder instance with the telemetry enabled.
member.remarks: By enabling telemetry, the resilience pipeline will log and meter all resilience events. Additionally, the telemetry strategy that logs and meters the executions is added to the beginning of the composite strategy.

member.name: M:Polly.TelemetryResiliencePipelineBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelemetry``1(``0,Polly.Telemetry.TelemetryOptions)
member.summary: Enables telemetry for this builder.
member.typeparam: The builder type.
member.param: The builder instance.
The resilience telemetry options.
member.returns: The builder instance with the telemetry enabled.
member.remarks: By enabling telemetry, the resilience pipeline will log and meter all resilience events. Additionally, the telemetry strategy that logs and meters the executions is added to the beginning of the composite strategy.

member.name: T:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext
member.summary: The validation context that encapsulates parameters for the validation.

member.name: M:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.#ctor(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The instance being validated.
The primary validation message.

member.name: P:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.Instance
member.summary: Gets the instance being validated.

member.name: P:Polly.ResilienceValidationContext.PrimaryMessage
member.summary: Gets the primary validation message.
member.remarks: The primary message is displayed first followed by the details about the validation errors.
